items.title: Unauthenticated File Upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer (versions prior to 1.11.12) can lead to remote code execution via a crafted cookie on any storefront request.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This Adobe Security Bulletin addresses multiple critical, important, and moderate security vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source, which could lead to unauthorized access, remote code execution, and service disruption.

items.title: PolyShell: Unrestricted File Upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store using a polyglot technique, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, execute unauthorized malicious code, or gain unauthorized access to store data.
